```{r}
#| fig-cap: Annual unique number of vessels in the AIS-broadcasting fleet, disaggregated by AIS receiver type (satellite, terrestrial, and dynamic) and total aggregated across receiver types, for the top 10 flags with the most emissions in 2024. A dashed vertical line is shown for 2022, the first year in which dynamic AIS was widely adopted.
#| fig-width: 7.5
#| fig-height: 6

annual_global_emissions_by_receiver_type_and_flag |>
  dplyr::inner_join(top_n_flags_2024, by = "flag") |>
  dplyr::mutate(flag = forcats::fct_relevel(flag,top_n_flags_2024$flag)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year,
             y = n_distinct_ssvid,
             color = flag)) +
  facet_grid(receiver_type~., scales = "free_y") +
  geom_line() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = unique(annual_global_emissions_by_receiver_type$year)) +
  theme_plot() +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Number unique vessels",
       color = "Flag") +
  theme(panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank()) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 2022, linetype = 2) +
  paletteer::scale_color_paletteer_d(palette = "rcartocolor::Safe")
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-co2-emissions-change-map-by-receiver-type
#| fig-cap: Spatial change in CO2 emissions by the AIS-broadcasting fleet between 2016 and 2024 (metric tonnes) by receiver type (satellite, terrestrial, and dynamic) and total across receiver types, at a 1x1 degree spatial resolution.
#| fig-width: 7.5
#| fig-height: 8

annual_spatial_emissions_by_receiver_type  |>
  dplyr::filter(year %in% c(2016,2024)) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = year,
                     values_from = emissions_co2_mt) |>
  dplyr::mutate(across(c(`2016`,`2024`),~tidyr::replace_na(.,0))) |>
  dplyr::mutate(change_emissions_co2 = `2024`-`2016`) |>
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = world_bbox_sf, fill = "black") +
  ggspatial::geom_spatial_tile(aes(x = lon_bin+0.5,
                                   y = lat_bin+0.5,
                                   fill = change_emissions_co2,
                                   color = change_emissions_co2)) +
  geom_sf(data = land,
          color = "#374a6d",
          fill = "#374a6d") +
  facet_wrap(receiver_type~., ncol=1) +
  scico::scale_fill_scico("Change in CO2 emissions\nfrom 2016 to 2024\n(MT)",
                          palette = "berlin",
                          midpoint = 0,
                          trans = ggallin::pseudolog10_trans,
                          na.value = "black",
                          breaks = c(-1e6,-1e3,0,1e3,1e6),
                          labels = scales::comma) +
  scico::scale_color_scico("Change in CO2 emissions\nfrom 2016 to 2024\n(MT)",
                           palette = "berlin",
                           midpoint = 0,
                           trans = ggallin::pseudolog10_trans,
                           na.value = "black",
                           breaks = c(-1e6,-1e3,0,1e3,1e6),
                           labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(x = '',
       y= '') +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        legend.direction = "vertical") +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title.position = "top",
                               title.hjust = 0.5,
                               frame.colour = "black",
                               ticks.colour = "black",
                               barwidth = unit(1, "cm"),
                               barheight = unit(5, "cm"))) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 1))+
  coord_sf(crs = map_projection)
```


## Olivier's plots

Following Olivier's complementary materials shared on Slack, we present the mean values of four parameters defining yearly information for AIS-broadcasting operating across all years. The data is derived from the ping-level dataset, thus including emissions associated with both port stays and trips.

```{r}
# Replicating Olivier's plot
annual_ais_co2_emissions_by_vessel <- glue::glue("{project_directory}/data/processed/annual_ais_co2_emissions_by_vessel.csv") |>
  readr::read_csv()

# This include vessels operating at all years
ssvid_op_2015_2024 <- annual_ais_co2_emissions_by_vessel |>
  dplyr::group_by(ssvid) |>
  dplyr::summarize(all_years_present = all(2015:2024 %in% year)) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::filter(all_years_present) |>
  dplyr::pull(ssvid)


vessels_op_2015_2024 <- annual_ais_co2_emissions_by_vessel |>
  dplyr::filter(ssvid %in% ssvid_op_2015_2024) |>
  dplyr::group_by(year) |>
  dplyr::summarize(m_emi = mean(emissions_co2_mt),
                   m_hrs = mean(hours),
                   m_spd = mean(speed_knots),
                   m_eng = mean(main_engine_power_kw)) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()

normalized_data <- vessels_op_2015_2024 |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    base_m_emi = m_emi[year == 2015],
    base_m_hrs = m_hrs[year == 2015],
    base_m_spd = m_spd[year == 2015],
    base_m_eng = m_eng[year == 2015]
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    norm_m_emi = m_emi / base_m_emi,
    norm_m_hrs = m_hrs / base_m_hrs,
    norm_m_spd = m_spd / base_m_spd,
    norm_m_eng = m_eng / base_m_eng
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(year, norm_m_emi, norm_m_hrs, norm_m_spd, norm_m_eng)

normalized_data_long <- normalized_data |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("norm"),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "value"
  )
```


```{r}
#| label: fig-all-years-operating-vessels-norm-mean-values-from-ping-level-emissions
#| fig-cap: Annual mean of individual per-vessel CO2 ping emissions (metric tonnes); total per-vessel operating hours; mean per-vessel main engine power (killowatts); and mean per-vessel speed (knots) for the set of AIS-broadcasting operating in all years, where each line is colored by the last operation year. Values are normalized againts 2015 estimates.
#| fig-height: 5
#| 
metric_colors <- c(
  "norm_m_emi" = "#4A90E2",      
  "norm_m_hrs" = "#D0021B",     
  "norm_m_spd" = "#7ED321",      
  "norm_m_eng" = "#F8E71C"      
)

ggplot2::ggplot(normalized_data_long, ggplot2::aes(x = year, y = value, color = metric)) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = 0.5) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Mean values across years",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Normalized Value",
    color = "Metric"
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(breaks = normalized_data_long$year) +  # Ensure year is shown as integers
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = metric_colors) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal() +
  ggplot2::theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

```

The relationship between hours and speeds may be misleading, as the dataset includes information from both trips and port stays. While hours accumulate regardless of whether a vessel is on a trip or at port, distances covered during port stays are minimal, leading to misrepresented speed values.

```{r}
updated_ais_co2_emissions <- glue::glue("{project_directory}/data/processed/annual_ais_co2_emissions_from_trips_dataset.csv") |>
  readr::read_csv()
```


```{r}
# Using trip emissions instead

# This include vessels operating at all years
ssvid_trip_op_2015_2024 <- updated_ais_co2_emissions |>
  dplyr::group_by(ssvid) |>
  dplyr::summarize(all_years_present = all(2015:2024 %in% year)) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::filter(all_years_present) |>
  dplyr::pull(ssvid)


vessels_op_2015_2024 <- updated_ais_co2_emissions |>
  dplyr::filter(ssvid %in% ssvid_trip_op_2015_2024) |>
  dplyr::group_by(year) |>
  dplyr::summarize(m_emi = mean(total_emissions_co2_mt),
                   m_hrs = mean(total_hours),
                   m_dis = mean(total_distance_nm),
                   m_spd = mean(avg_speed),
                   m_eng = mean(main_engine_power_kw)) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()

normalized_data <- vessels_op_2015_2024 |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    base_m_emi = m_emi[year == 2015],
    base_m_hrs = m_hrs[year == 2015],
    base_m_dis = m_dis[year == 2015],
    base_m_spd = m_spd[year == 2015],
    base_m_eng = m_eng[year == 2015]
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    norm_m_emi = m_emi / base_m_emi,
    norm_m_hrs = m_hrs / base_m_hrs,
    norm_m_dis = m_dis / base_m_dis,
    norm_m_spd = m_spd / base_m_spd,
    norm_m_eng = m_eng / base_m_eng
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(year, norm_m_emi, norm_m_hrs, norm_m_dis, norm_m_spd, norm_m_eng)

normalized_data_long <- normalized_data |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("norm"),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "value"
  )
```

To address this, we can assess the actual changes in these parameters (considering distances as well) by exclusively analyzing emissions from trips. Below, we present data extracted from the trip emissions dataset, aggregated by vessel for all trips starting in a given year. This shows a completely different trend compared to the observations above. Restricting vessel information to those that has a registered at least one trip in each year has moved the number of vessels considered in this representation from `r length(ssvid_op_2015_2024)` to `r length(ssvid_trip_op_2015_2024)`

```{r}
#| label: fig-all-years-operating-vessels-norm-mean-values-from-trip-level-emissions
#| fig-cap: Annual mean of individual per-vessel CO2 trip emissions (metric tonnes); total per-vessel operating hours; mean per-vessel main engine power (killowatts); mean per-vessel speed (knots); and total distance traveled for the set of AIS-broadcasting operating in all years, where each line is colored by the last operation year.
#| fig-height: 5

metric_colors <- c(
  "norm_m_emi" = "#4A90E2",      
  "norm_m_hrs" = "#D0021B",
  "norm_m_dis" = "purple",
  "norm_m_spd" = "#7ED321",      
  "norm_m_eng" = "#F8E71C"      
)

ggplot2::ggplot(normalized_data_long, ggplot2::aes(x = year, y = value, color = metric)) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = 0.5) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Mean values across years",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Normalized Value",
    color = "Metric"
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(breaks = normalized_data_long$year) + 
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = metric_colors) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal() +
  ggplot2::theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )
```


## Assessing number of vessels

```{r, eval = FALSE}
#| label:  fig-time-series-nb-vessels-area
#| fig-cap: Summary of total global monthly CO2 emissions over time. All emissions units are in metric tonnes, disaggregated by the AIS-broadcasting fleet and the dark fleet as detected by S1.
#| fig-height: 5


time_series_nb_vessels <- monthly_ais_vessels_and_ratios |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    ratio_dark_to_ais = ifelse(is.na(ratio_dark_to_ais_detections), 0, ratio_dark_to_ais_detections),
    extr_dark_vessels = ratio_dark_to_ais * unique_ais_vessels) |>
  dplyr::group_by(time) |> 
  dplyr::summarise(unique_ais_vessels = sum(unique_ais_vessels, na.rm = TRUE),
                   extr_dark_vessels = sum(extr_dark_vessels, na.rm = TRUE))


time_series_nb_vessels |> 
  filter(lubridate::year(time) > 2015) |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = c(extr_dark_vessels, unique_ais_vessels),  # Ensure order
               names_to = "fleet", 
               values_to = "count") |> 
  mutate(fleet = recode(fleet, 
                        extr_dark_vessels = "Dark", 
                        unique_ais_vessels = "AIS"),
         time = as.Date(time)) |> 
  mutate(fleet = factor(fleet, levels = c("Dark", "AIS"))) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = time, y = count, fill = fleet)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack", alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_line(data = ~filter(., fleet == "AIS"), 
            aes(color = fleet), size = 0.5, color = "white") + 
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%Y", date_breaks = "1 year") +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Number of vessels") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::unit_format(unit = "M", scale = 1e-6)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("AIS" = "#4f83db", "Dark" = "red"))
```


```{r, eval = FALSE}
#| label:  fig-time-series-nb-vessels_line
#| fig-cap: Summary of total global monthly CO2 emissions over time. All emissions units are in metric tonnes, disaggregated by the AIS-broadcasting fleet and the dark fleet as detected by S1.
#| fig-height: 5

time_series_nb_vessels |> 
  filter(lubridate::year(time) > 2015) |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = c(extr_dark_vessels, unique_ais_vessels),  # Ensure order
               names_to = "fleet", 
               values_to = "count") |> 
  mutate(fleet = recode(fleet, 
                        extr_dark_vessels = "Dark", 
                        unique_ais_vessels = "AIS"),
         time = as.Date(time)) |> 
  mutate(fleet = factor(fleet, levels = c("Dark", "AIS"))) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = time, y = count, color = fleet)) +
  geom_line() +  
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%Y", date_breaks = "1 year") +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "NUmber of vessels") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::unit_format(unit = "M", scale = 1e-6)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Dark" = "red", "AIS" = "#619CFF"))

```


```{r, eval = FALSE}
#| label:  fig-time-series-emissions-vessels-area
#| fig-cap: Summary of total global monthly CO2 emissions over time. All emissions units are in metric tonnes, disaggregated by the AIS-broadcasting fleet and the dark fleet as detected by S1.
#| fig-height: 5



time_series_nb_vessels <- monthly_ais_vessels_and_ratios |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    ratio_dark_to_ais = ifelse(is.na(ratio_dark_to_ais_detections), 0, ratio_dark_to_ais_detections),
    updated_dark_emissions = ratio_dark_to_ais * total_ais_emissions_co2_mt) |>
  dplyr::group_by(time) |> 
  dplyr::summarise(total_ais_emissions_co2_mt = sum(total_ais_emissions_co2_mt, na.rm = TRUE),
                   updated_total_dark_emissions = sum(updated_dark_emissions, na.rm = TRUE),
                   total_dark_emissions_co2_mt = sum(total_dark_emissions_co2_mt, na.rm = TRUE),
  )


time_series_nb_vessels |> 
  filter(lubridate::year(time) > 2015) |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = c(updated_total_dark_emissions, total_ais_emissions_co2_mt),  # Ensure order
               names_to = "fleet", 
               values_to = "emissions") |> 
  mutate(fleet = recode(fleet, 
                        updated_total_dark_emissions = "Dark", 
                        total_ais_emissions_co2_mt = "AIS"),
         time = as.Date(time)) |> 
  mutate(fleet = factor(fleet, levels = c("AIS", "Dark"))) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = time, y = emissions, fill = fleet)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack", alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_line(data = ~filter(., fleet == "Dark"), 
            aes(color = fleet), size = 0.5, color = "white") + 
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%Y", date_breaks = "1 year") +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "CO2 emissions (mT)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::unit_format(unit = "M", scale = 1e-6)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("AIS" = "#4f83db", "Dark" = "red"))
```


```{r, eval = FALSE}
#| label:  fig-time-series-emissions-vessels-area-original
#| fig-cap: Summary of total global monthly CO2 emissions over time. All emissions units are in metric tonnes, disaggregated by the AIS-broadcasting fleet and the dark fleet as detected by S1.
#| fig-height: 5


time_series_nb_vessels |> 
  filter(lubridate::year(time) > 2015) |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = c(total_dark_emissions_co2_mt, total_ais_emissions_co2_mt),  # Ensure order
               names_to = "fleet", 
               values_to = "emissions") |> 
  mutate(fleet = recode(fleet, 
                        total_dark_emissions_co2_mt = "Dark", 
                        total_ais_emissions_co2_mt = "AIS"),
         time = as.Date(time)) |> 
  mutate(fleet = factor(fleet, levels = c("AIS", "Dark"))) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = time, y = emissions, fill = fleet)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack", alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_line(data = ~filter(., fleet == "Dark"), 
            aes(color = fleet), size = 0.5, color = "white") + 
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%Y", date_breaks = "1 year") +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "CO2 emissions (mT)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::unit_format(unit = "M", scale = 1e-6)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("AIS" = "#4f83db", "Dark" = "red"))
```


```{r, eval = FALSE}
#| label: fig-time-series-nb-vessels-pixel
#| fig-cap: Summary of total global monthly CO2 emissions over time. All emissions units are in metric tonnes, disaggregated by the AIS-broadcasting fleet and the dark fleet as detected by S1.
#| fig-height: 5

time_series_nb_vessels_pixel <- monthly_ais_vessels_and_ratios_by_pixel |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    ratio_dark_to_ais = ifelse(is.na(ratio_dark_to_ais), 0, ratio_dark_to_ais),
    extr_dark_vessels = ratio_dark_to_ais * unique_ais_vessels) |>
  dplyr::group_by(time) |> 
  dplyr::summarise(unique_ais_vessels = sum(unique_ais_vessels),
                   extr_dark_vessels = sum(extr_dark_vessels))


time_series_nb_vessels_pixel |> 
  filter(lubridate::year(time) > 2015) |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = c(extr_dark_vessels, unique_ais_vessels),  # Ensure order
               names_to = "vessel_type", 
               values_to = "count") |> 
  mutate(vessel_type = recode(vessel_type, 
                              extr_dark_vessels = "Dark", 
                              unique_ais_vessels = "AIS"),
         time = as.Date(time)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = time, y = count, fill = vessel_type)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack", alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_line(data = ~filter(., vessel_type == "Dark"), 
            aes(color = vessel_type), size = 0.5, color = "white") + 
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%Y", date_breaks = "1 year") +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Number of vessels") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::unit_format(unit = "M", scale = 1e-6)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("AIS" = "#4f83db", "Dark" = "red"))

```



## Methods

### Outside and withing S1 footprint ratios

```{r}


create_filtered_dfs <- function(fishing_status) {
  if (!is.logical(fishing_status)) stop("fishing_status must be TRUE or FALSE")
  
  # Step 1: Compute mean_ratio for within footprint
  within_ratios <- s1_knn_ratios_within_footprint %>%
    filter(fishing == fishing_status) %>%
    group_by(lat_bin, lon_bin) %>%
    summarize(mean_ratio = mean(avg_neighbor_ratio, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
  
  # Step 2: Compute mean_ratio for outside footprint
  outside_ratios <- s1_knn_ratios_outside_footprint %>%
    filter(fishing == fishing_status) %>%
    group_by(lat_bin, lon_bin) %>%
    summarize(mean_ratio = mean(avg_neighbor_ratio, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
  
  # Step 3: Remove overlapping locations
  filtered_outside_ratios <- outside_ratios %>%
    anti_join(within_ratios, by = c("lat_bin", "lon_bin"))
  
  return(list(within_ratios = within_ratios, filtered_outside_ratios = filtered_outside_ratios))
}


# Compute global limits for color scale
all_data <- bind_rows(
  create_filtered_dfs(TRUE)$within_ratios,
  create_filtered_dfs(TRUE)$filtered_outside_ratios,
  create_filtered_dfs(FALSE)$within_ratios,
  create_filtered_dfs(FALSE)$filtered_outside_ratios
)

scale_limits <- c(0.001, max(all_data$mean_ratio, na.rm = TRUE))

# Generate data for fishing and non-fishing vessels
fishing_data <- create_filtered_dfs(TRUE)
non_fishing_data <- create_filtered_dfs(FALSE)

# Create a single integrated ggplot with facets
combined_data <- bind_rows(
  fishing_data$filtered_outside_ratios %>% mutate(footprint = "Outside S1 footprint", fishing_status = "Fishing"),
  fishing_data$within_ratios %>% mutate(footprint = "Within S1 footprint", fishing_status = "Fishing"),
  non_fishing_data$filtered_outside_ratios %>% mutate(footprint = "Outside S1 footprint", fishing_status = "Non-Fishing"),
  non_fishing_data$within_ratios %>% mutate(footprint = "Within S1 footprint", fishing_status = "Non-Fishing")
)

# Reorder factor levels to ensure correct placement in facet grid
combined_data$footprint <- factor(combined_data$footprint, levels = c("Within S1 footprint", "Outside S1 footprint"))

p_combined <- ggplot(combined_data) +
  geom_tile(aes(x = lon_bin, y = lat_bin, fill = mean_ratio)) +
  geom_sf(data = land, color = "#374a6d", fill = "#374a6d") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c("Average ratios (log scale)",
                       trans = "log10",
                       option = "mako",
                       na.value = "black",
                       limits = scale_limits) +
  labs(x = '', y = '') +
  theme_map() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title.position = "top",
                               title.hjust = 0.5,
                               frame.colour = "black",
                               ticks.colour = "black",
                               barwidth = unit(10, "cm"),
                               barheight = unit(0.5, "cm")))  +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 1)) +
  facet_grid(rows = vars(fishing_status), cols = vars(footprint))

p_combined
```



###  Fraction of S1-detected vessels

```{r}
#| label: fig-dark-vessel-fraction-detected-time-series
#| fig-cap: Fraction of S1-detected vessels matched AIS-broadcasting vessels over time, disaggregated by vessel type and length size class



summarized_s1_dark_fleet_ratios <- s1_summarized_dark_fleet_ratios_spatial |>
  dplyr::filter(year<2025) |>
  group_by(year, fishing, length_size_class_percentile) %>%
  summarize(across(c(number_dark_detections,
                     number_ais_detections), ~sum(.,na.rm=TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(ratio_dark_to_ais_detections = number_dark_detections / number_ais_detections,
         fraction_tracked = number_ais_detections / (number_ais_detections + number_dark_detections))

summarized_s1_dark_fleet_ratios %>%
  filter(!is.na(fishing)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = ratio_dark_to_ais_detections, color = factor(length_size_class_percentile),group=length_size_class_percentile)) +
  geom_line() +
  paletteer::scale_color_paletteer_d(palette = "jcolors::pal10") +
  theme_plot() +
  facet_grid(.~fishing) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,NA)) +
  labs(color = "Length bin",
       x = "",
       y = "Ratio of S1-detected dark vessels\nto matched AIS-broadcasting vessels")+
  guides(linetype  = guide_legend(order = 2,
                                  reverse = TRUE),
         color = guide_legend(order = 1))
```

### Summary of global annual CO2 dark emissions over time

```{r}
#| label: fig-global-annual-co2-dark-emissions-by-type
#| fig-cap: Summary of global annual CO2 dark emissions over time, disaggregated by vessel type.
#| fig-height: 5



time_series_data_annual_agg_dark <- s1_summarized_dark_fleet_model_results_emissions_year %>%
  group_by(year,pollutant, dark) %>%
  summarize(emissions_mt = sum(emissions_mt)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(Fleet = ifelse(dark,"Dark","AIS")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-dark) |>
  # Don't inclde last year of data, since it's incomplete
  dplyr::filter(year<2025)

dark_percentage_2024 <- time_series_data_annual_agg_dark %>%
  filter(year == 2024, pollutant == "CO2") %>%
  summarise(
    dark_percentage = emissions_mt[Fleet == "Dark"] / sum(emissions_mt) * 100
  ) %>% pull() %>% round(1)

time_series_data_annual_agg_dark_by_group <- s1_summarized_dark_fleet_model_results_emissions_year |>
  # Don't inclde last year of data, since it's incomplete
  dplyr::filter(year<2025)%>%
  filter(dark == TRUE & pollutant == "CO2") %>% 
  group_by(year, fishing, length_size_class_percentile) %>%
  summarize(emissions_mt = sum(emissions_mt)) %>%
  ungroup()

time_series_data_annual_agg_dark_by_group %>%
  filter(!is.na(fishing))%>%
  mutate( fishing = forcats::fct_recode(as.factor(fishing),
                                        "Fishing" = "TRUE", 
                                        "Non-fishing" = "FALSE")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = emissions_mt, fill = factor(length_size_class_percentile))) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = unique(time_series_data_annual_agg_dark$year)) +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "CO2 dark emissions (MT)",
       fill = "Length bin") +
  theme_plot() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::unit_format(unit = "M", scale = 1e-6)) +
  facet_grid(fishing~.,scales = "free_y") +
  paletteer::scale_fill_paletteer_d(palette = "jcolors::pal10")
```
